title: Participatory Research Protocol
author: Amsterdam UMC Location VUmc
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This document provides information on the participatory research trajectory. It contains an overview of the development of the two applications in all four study sites within the three relevant stakeholder groups (healthcare practitioners, families and adolescents). It provides a framework for the research as well as an initial timeline, research goals and suggested activities to address them. NOTE: NOT YET APPROVED BY EUROPEAN COMMISSION
